title: berberis pavoniana
intro: Berberis pavoniana, also known as the golden barberry, is a deciduous shrub native to the Himalayan region with thorny branches and yellow flowers. The plant is rich in berberine, a bioactive compound with antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it a valuable medicinal plant. The health benefits of Berberis pavoniana include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Berberis pavoniana is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be found in capsule or powder form, often used to treat various health issues.
